course_title: SPECIAL EDUCATION STUDENT TEACHING: ELEMENTARY (PK - GRADE 9)
description: Full time student teaching in an approved placement with a qualified cooperating teacher serving students with disabilities in any of grades PK-Grade 9, supervised by a qualified university supervisor. Placement schedule follows the host school district calendar.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Special Education BSE, Special Education MS, or Elementary Education BSE: Middle Childhood Through Early Adolescence/Special Education Dual Cert
